---
title: Abdulla Mutraji
last: Mutraji
first: Abdulla
people_group: researcher
subtitle: Research Staff
description: ""
image: avatar.jpg
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:Abdulla.Mutraji@osumc.edu
---

<hr>

::: {#about}
Abdulla is a Research Assistant in the Turner Lab at The Ohio State University. He earned his medical degree from Ankara University Faculty of Medicine. His interests lie in psychosis research, especially in understanding the neurobiology of psychiatric disorders and how this work can lead to more thoughtful and effective clinical care. He hopes to build a career at the intersection of clinical psychiatry and research. Outside of the lab, he enjoys cooking, baking, and spending time outdoors.
:::
